title: Zillow Makes Double-Digit Gains in Revenue, Profits in Q3
text: Zillow Revenue Streams and Growth Analysis. Zillow's Revenue Streams: Zillow has three main revenue streams: 1. Residential (For Sale): The company's main revenue stream, residential, rose 7% to $435 million in Q3 2025. 2. Mortgages: Mortgage revenue increased 36% to $53 million in Q3 2025. 3. Rentals: Rentals revenue was up 41% year-over-year to $174 million in Q3 2025. Mortgage Revenue Growth: The mortgage business has been a standout performer. The growth in its mortgage line, which includes both Zillow Home Loans and the marketplace where consumers can search for rates, was driven by a 57% increase in purchase loan origination volume. More recently, Mortgages revenue was $64 million in Q1 2026, up 56% year over year. According to the company, purchase loan originations rose 96% to $1.5 billion, which primarily drove the revenue increase. Overall Company Performance: For the full year 2025, the residential sector generated $1.704 billion in revenue, up 7% annually, while the mortgage operation generated $199 million in revenue, up 37% compared to the year prior. Zillow Group achieved 16% revenue growth and $23 million in net income in 2025, with its mortgage and rental segments leading the gains.
